summary: Chile uses 8-digit tariff codes based on the Harmonized System (HS). 6-digit HS base plus 2 Chilean-specific additional digits.

notes: Chile tariff data is publicly available through World Bank WITS and WTO systems. No single official Chilean government download link identified, but data accessible through international trade databases.
